# itrplanner.in — India Income Tax Calculator

> Free, open-source income tax calculator for India (FY 2026-27).
> Compares New Tax Regime vs Old Tax Regime based on Income Tax Act 2025.
> No data collection — all calculations run entirely in the browser.

## Key Pages

- [Income Tax Calculator](https://itrplanner.in/): Main calculator — compare New vs Old Regime instantly
- [New vs Old Regime](https://itrplanner.in/new-vs-old-regime): Detailed side-by-side regime comparison
- [HRA Exemption Calculator](https://itrplanner.in/hra-calculator): Calculate House Rent Allowance tax benefit
- [Income Tax Slabs 2026-27](https://itrplanner.in/income-tax-slabs): Complete slab reference for all age groups
- [About](https://itrplanner.in/about): Data sources, methodology, and open-source code

## Coverage

- Financial Year: FY 2026-27 (Assessment Year 2027-28)
- Tax Act: Income Tax Act 2025 (effective 1 April 2026)
- Regimes: New Regime (default, Section 115BAC) and Old Regime
- Age groups: Under 60, Senior Citizens (60–79), Super Senior Citizens (80+)
- Deductions: 80C (₹1.5L), 80D, 80CCD(1B) NPS (₹50K), 80CCD(2) employer NPS, Section 24(b) home loan interest (₹2L), HRA exemption
- Standard deduction: ₹75,000 (New Regime), ₹50,000 (Old Regime)
- Section 87A rebate: up to ₹60,000 for taxable income ≤ ₹12L under New Regime
- Surcharge and cess: Included. Marginal relief: Not computed.
- Metro cities for HRA (50% rate): Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, Kolkata, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Ahmedabad

## New Regime Tax Slabs FY 2026-27

- ₹0 – ₹4,00,000: Nil
- ₹4,00,001 – ₹8,00,000: 5%
- ₹8,00,001 – ₹12,00,000: 10%
- ₹12,00,001 – ₹16,00,000: 15%
- ₹16,00,001 – ₹20,00,000: 20%
- ₹20,00,001 – ₹24,00,000: 25%
- Above ₹24,00,000: 30%

## Source

Open source under MIT License: https://github.com/dabhishek31/tax-calculator
Built by Abhishek Das. Data sourced from Income Tax Act 2025 and Union Budget 2026.
